title: Improve console UI contrast and icons
description: Adjust kanban contrast between background/columns/cards, move issue ID into type band, remove status badge, add Lucide icons for settings and issue type (icon + label), and add settings panel background to prevent overlap.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Updated console UI: added Lucide icons (settings + issue type icon+label), moved issue ID into accent band, removed status badge, increased theme contrast by deepening card-muted, and set settings panel background to card-muted. Pending: verify visual contrast and run UI tests.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted settings panel to use bg-card and z-40 so it renders above board and is clickable. Set issue accent ID color to text-foreground (no inversion).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted theme palette to align with Biblicus (Radix gray/blue/sand steps) and increased contrast by bumping card-muted from step 4 to step 5 for clearer separation between page, columns, and cards.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added settings overlay/backdrop with pointer-events gating; settings panel uses bg-card-muted and z-50 to prevent overlap and ensure selectors are clickable.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Raised settings overlay to z-60, added explicit card-muted backdrop (hsl var with opacity), and set panel to bg-card with pointer-events-auto to ensure clickability.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Forced settings overlay/panel inline styles: explicit backgroundColor for backdrop and panel, z-index separation (backdrop 0, panel 1), and inline pointer-events gating to ensure clickability even if classes fail.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Forced settings overlay to always render with inline background and z-index 9999, only displayed when open. Reworked issue card accent strip: left icon + type + id, right priority; removed badges and status display.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Reworked settings overlay logic: parent pointer-events now controlled by isOpen, added inline background fallbacks for backdrop/panel, added opacity control, and set explicit z-index layering. Also set transform/opacity directly on open/close to ensure visibility even if GSAP fails.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added explicit column background token (var(--column)) to separate page, columns, and cards. Columns now use --column; themes map column to Radix step 4 and card-muted to step 5 for contrast.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Increased contrast aggressively: background step1, card step3, column step6, card-muted step7 across neutral/cool/warm themes.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Fixed invalid hsl(var(--...)) usage by switching Tailwind and globals to raw var(...) colors; settings panel/backdrop now use var(--card)/var(--background) so backgrounds render. Updated card strip to icon+ID left, priority right; removed type label. Cleaned unused accent type CSS.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Removed per-column scroll area; board now single-row flex with horizontal overflow. Columns stretch to same height and expand with content. Added Show/Hide closed toggle next to view selector; closed column hidden by default and appears on right when enabled.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted issue accent colors by mode: light mode uses lighter Radix steps (2/4) so text stays dark on light bands; dark mode overrides use darker steps (4/9) so text stays light on dark bands.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Dark mode accent bands deepened to Radix step 10 (muted step 5) to improve contrast; light mode remains step 4/2 so proportions match across modes.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added visibility icons for closed toggle: Eye for show closed, EyeOff for hide closed.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Fixed settings close animation by animating panel/backdrop on close and deferring pointer-events disable until animation completes. Added visual selector content: mode icons (Sun/Moon/Monitor), theme swatches, and font previews with Type icon.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Dark mode accent bands deepened again to Radix step 11 (muted 6) to improve contrast against light text and match light-mode contrast proportions.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Updated settings selector visuals to match reference: added selector option wrappers/swatches and enforced wrapping within panel to prevent overflow (warm). AnimatedSelector now supports max-width/nowrap buttons.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Persisted showClosed in localStorage; transitionKey now includes showClosed so board animates when toggling closed (respecting motion mode via useBoardTransitions).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Reduced background vs column contrast by shifting column token from step 6 to step 5 across neutral/cool/warm themes.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Further reduced background vs column contrast by shifting column token to step 4 across neutral/cool/warm themes.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Reduced column contrast further by aligning column token with card background (step 3) across neutral/cool/warm themes, bringing columns closer to page background.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Restored distinct layers with subtle contrast: background step1, card step2, column step3 across neutral/cool/warm themes (card-muted unchanged).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Tightened vertical spacing above kanban columns by reducing top section margins and halving column header bottom margin.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Made selector/buttons lighter and same height: AnimatedSelector now bg-card with h-8, reduced padding; show/hide and settings buttons use bg-card, h-8, tighter vertical padding.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added animated selector highlight background using selector-highlight class: light mode uses card-muted for stronger selection; dark mode uses card. Highlight still moves via GSAP respecting motion settings.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Faded unselected selector items (text-muted/70). Added fixed-width show/hide closed toggle with opacity transition respecting motion mode (duration varies by motion setting).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted selector thumb contrast: light mode uses --column (slightly darker), dark mode uses --card-muted (slightly lighter).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Ensured show/hide closed label never wraps (whitespace-nowrap) and widened button to w-40.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted unselected selector text to be more muted per mode: text-muted/60 in light, dark:text-muted/80 in dark; selected stays text-foreground.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added icons to view selector options: Target for Initiatives, Flag for Epics, Layers for Tasks.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Updated view selector icons: Lightbulb for Initiatives, ListChecks for Epics.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Recorded future sub-tasks selector icon mapping to CheckCheck; centralized view selector icons in VIEW_ICONS.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Set selector text colors to match requirement: selected uses text-foreground, unselected uses text-muted (no opacity variants).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Removed bottom scrollbar pill by hiding kb-grid scrollbar and removing bottom padding; horizontal scroll still works.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Muted text made fainter by shifting to Radix step 10 for neutral/cool/warm themes (lighter in light mode, darker in dark mode).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Replaced theme selector with fixed 3-column button grid to prevent wrapping/overlap; each option includes swatches and label with selected background.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added X icon to settings Close button.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Matched settings Close button styling to top nav buttons: faint pill bg-card, h-8, tighter vertical padding.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Stacked theme swatches above labels to prevent overlap; switched to vertical layout with taller buttons.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted settings Close button background to use page background (bg-background) for contrast against panel.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Refactored detail view into right column: TaskDetailPanel now animates column width (33%) and content transitions; shows issue detail card + comments list; added detail column/card/comment styles to match kanban layout.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Detail column now gets explicit width/flex-basis/padding when open for non-GSAP fallback, ensuring selected issue renders visibly.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added 40px fade band at board right edge when detail open; moved detail close button below accent bar with settings-style background; added close row styling.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added drag-resizable detail column with persistent width (20-60%); added resizer handle and widthPercent prop for detail panel.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Widened detail fade band from 40px to 100px for smoother gradient.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Moved detail Close button inline with headline for tighter vertical layout.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Applied issue-card data attributes to detail card so the accent color band renders.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added selected card outline: issue-card-selected uses 8px white box-shadow outside card; selection passed from board to cards via selectedIssueId.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Reworked detail resize handle to use mouse/touch events (broader support) and ensured resizer stretches and is clickable.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Made resize handle visible: width 8px, card-muted background with hover opacity. Should now be easy to spot between board and detail column.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Redesigned layout to frame+slots: page background now column color; layout-frame uses column color with two layout-slot surfaces for board and detail; removed gradient fade between columns.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Tightened layout: removed column backgrounds, halved paddings, selection outline now uses column color. Detail column has no outer padding (content padded inside), and slots/columns scroll within rounded rectangles.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Swapped task-level icon to SquareCheckBig.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Removed outer padding in detail content wrapper so the detail card sits flush to the rounded slot; card and slot share same 12px radius.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Removed GSAP padding animation on detail column to eliminate 12px inline padding; width remains dynamic inline while layout/padding uses Tailwind/CSS.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Starting fix: remove remaining inline styles to ensure full Tailwind usage, including settings dialog background and selector interactions. Will replace style props with Tailwind/CSS classes and verify layout/detail column behavior.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Removed remaining inline styles in SettingsPanel, added Tailwind classes and CSS swatch classes. Removed GSAP width/padding on detail column so width comes from CSS vars/classes, added width transitions in CSS with motion-off override, and ensured settings panel z-order via Tailwind. Next: verify UI for detail slot padding and any remaining layout issues.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Fixed detail column animation to be single CSS transition (opacity/transform/width) and removed GSAP panel animation. Added detail-section wrapper so comments/sub-tasks align with card padding; added CSS for swatches and detail section.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted layout to make page non-scrollable and slots scrollable: html/body/#root fixed height with overflow hidden; layout frame/slots/detail set to full height; KB grid min-height 100%. AppShell now uses h-screen + overflow-hidden and App.tsx layout wrapper uses flex-1 min-h-0.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Converted layout spacing to Tailwind utilities: board grid/columns, issue cards, accent bar, detail sections/comments, layout frame/slot. Removed p3-based spacing from globals.css and added Tailwind padding/gaps in JSX; badge now adds p-3/gap-3 via Tailwind.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Set layout spacing baseline to Tailwind p-2: frame/slot padding p-2, board grid/column gaps 2, card padding/gaps 2, accent bar updated to -m-2/px-2/h-6 with width calc, detail sections/comments p-2, badge p-2.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Removed padding from layout frame (p-2) per request; frame now only uses gap-2.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Removed p-2 padding from kanban columns (kb-column) per request.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added pl-2/pr-2 to column header labels and counts for alignment.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted AnimatedSelector button horizontal padding to px-2 (from px-3).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Right-aligned view selector with show-closed and settings; removed Show/Hide from toggle label (now Open/Closed) and removed Settings text (icon only).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Tightened open/closed toggle button: removed fixed width and reduced horizontal padding to px-2.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Increased common icon size to h-4 w-4 across view selector, toggle, settings, and detail close; issue accent icon size increased to 16px.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Updated epic card icon to ListChecks to match selector (replacing Flag).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted slot scrollbars: added scrollbar-gutter: stable and thin width for layout slot + detail column; added webkit scrollbar styling to reduce layout shift and keep thumb subtle.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Reworked detail panel scrolling: header/accent band stays above scroll; added detail-scroll container (overflow-y auto) and moved comments/sub-tasks into it. Detail column now hides overflow; scrollbar styling moved to detail-scroll.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted detail panel so only accent band is fixed; title/description move into scroll area. Added detail-scroll padding-right and detail-accent strip width/margin to keep band full-width despite scrollbar.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Removed detail-accent-strip width/margin hack and detail-scroll padding-right to fix cropped accent bar.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Removed negative margin/width from detail accent bar and dropped overflow clipping on the accent container.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Fixed detail accent bar rounding: now only top corners rounded and clipped; removed issue-card class to avoid full rounding.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Restored issue-card class on detail accent bar to ensure accent colors apply while keeping top-only rounding via detail-accent-bar styles.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Removed scrollbar-gutter from detail column/scroll area to eliminate reserved right padding; kept thin scrollbar styling.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Aligned detail accent band with card band: detail header now p-2 with accent bar using -m-2 and width calc like cards; added gap-2 between header and scroll; removed margin-bottom from accent container.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Made kanban column headers fixed with h-6 to align with detail accent band; moved cards into scrollable kb-column-scroll area with matching scrollbar styling.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Aligned top bar heights: column header and issue accent bands now h-7 so baselines match between column headers and detail accent ID.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Matched issue ID text size/baseline to column headers by bumping issue-accent-id to 12px with line-height 1 and 600 weight.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted detail accent band height to h-8 to lower baseline alignment with column headers.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Increased detail accent band height to h-9 for more vertical padding around issue ID.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Increased detail accent band height to h-10 to lower ID baseline further.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Aligned detail accent text baseline by switching to items-end with pb-1 inside detail accent band.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted detail accent baseline downshift to pb-0.5 to reduce extra top space.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added issue type icon to detail accent band using same Lucide icon mapping as cards.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Reduced detail accent band height to h-9 while keeping pb-0.5 for baseline alignment; lowers top whitespace.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted detail accent band alignment: h-10 with items-start pt-1 to reduce top whitespace and add more below the ID.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Reset detail accent band to match card proportions: h-7, items-center, -m-2, px-2.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added pt-1 to detail accent band to nudge ID downward from baseline while keeping card-matching proportions.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Increased detail accent band padding top to pt-2 for lower ID baseline.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted detail accent band to pt-3 to align ID baseline further down.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Raised detail accent band padding to pt-4.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Increased detail accent band height and added pb-2 to create more color below the ID (h-9, pt-4, pb-2).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Moved detail close button up next to the 'Issue detail' label; headline now spans full width. Close button resized to h-7 with smaller text.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Fixed duplication and right alignment: Issue detail label with right-justified close button on same baseline; removed extra label copy.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Reduced right padding on detail close button (px-2).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Trimmed detail close button padding to px-1.5.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Tightened detail close button padding further to px-1.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Set issue description text in detail view to text-foreground (was text-muted).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Replaced 'Issue detail' label with '{type} · {status}' values; kept close button aligned. File: console/src/components/TaskDetailPanel.tsx.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Reduced top padding on detail accent band to pt-3 to tighten space above type/status row.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Named outer frame color: added --frame using Radix *-3 per theme and switched layout-frame background to var(--frame).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Removed duplicate type/status block under description; only assignee remains if present.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted frame color to Radix step 2 for all themes (gray-2/blue-2/sand-2).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Set frame color to white for all themes temporarily to verify binding.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Fixed right-side halo: issue-card-selected now uses inset 4px highlight instead of 8px outer shadow that protruded past column edge.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Removed outer board scroll (layout-slot now overflow:hidden) so only column scrollbars render; should eliminate right-edge band.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Removed gap-2 on kb-grid to eliminate right-edge band/shadow.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Removed gap-2 on layout-frame (outer board frame) to address right-edge band.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Set frame color to Radix step 1 for each theme (gray-1/blue-1/sand-1).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted frame color to theme step 2 (gray-2/blue-2/sand-2).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Set frame color to theme step 3 (gray-3/blue-3/sand-3) for better visibility.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Set board and detail backgrounds to match control pill color: layout-slot and detail-column now use var(--card).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Restored gap-2 between kanban columns (kb-grid).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Card content background set to Radix step 1 for all themes (card = background tone).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Set board container background to var(--card), same as unselected view selector background.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Aligned surfaces with step-1 increments: card=*1, frame=*2, column=*3 for all themes.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Made view selector distinct: container bg uses column, highlight uses card-muted. Files: animated-selector.tsx, globals.css.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Toggle label now 'Open'/'All' (was 'Open'/'Closed').

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Buttons now use board color (bg-column); selector highlight uses background (notch 1). Files: App.tsx, globals.css.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Confirmed buttons use board color (bg-column); selector thumb stays background (step1).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added tailwind tokens for frame and column colors so bg-frame/bg-column classes use CSS vars; buttons should now pick up board color.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added left fade strip to detail panel using ::before gradient (0% transparent to 12% black over 40px) to softly obscure board beneath overlay.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Prevent detail overlay from clipping board when closed: detail column width now 0/pointer-events none when closed, restores width on open; fade only shows when open.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Switched detail to true two-column layout: detail is flex item with width 0 when closed, no overlay/fade; resizer is normal flex item between board and detail; layout-frame flex row with stretch.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Reintroduced left-edge fade for detail column in two-column mode via ::before gradient from transparent to var(--card), only when open.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted detail left-edge fade to blend from transparent to board surface (var(--column)) instead of card color.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Made detail fade visible using transparent→rgba overlay with mix-blend-mode:multiply so it visually fades board underlay instead of flat fill.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Removed p-2 padding from layout-slot-board to eliminate extra left-side strip before detail panel.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Removed scrollbar-gutter: stable from layout-slot to eliminate reserved right-side space that looked like padding.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Moved fade strip into layout frame as real element and positioned it at right: var(--detail-width) with gradient to var(--frame); set detail column z-index to 2 so fade sits above board but below panel.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Persisting detail width explicitly as percent string (e.g., 44%) in localStorage for settings.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Fixed detail width persistence: store raw numeric percent (no %) and parseFloat on load so reopened detail retains last width.
